title: Oligodendrocytes
script_summary: Unravel the fascinating role of oligodendrocytes in our nervous system.

segments.voiceover: Science has a clearer story about oligodendrocytes than social media does.
These cells are vital for insulating nerve fibers, helping signals travel faster.
But did you know they also support the survival of neurons?
Research shows oligodendrocytes can regenerate, yet this ability decreases with age.
Understanding them could unlock treatments for conditions like MS.
Curious about more fascinating science? Like and follow for deeper dives!
